upload.subtitle: PPT → VIDEO
upload.title: PPT to Video
upload.desc: Upload PPT or PDF with an optional avatar. Speech is synthesized through the Aliyun API only, then AI generates the final video page by page.
upload.avatarTipTime: Using a digital human will add about 5–10 minutes to generation time
upload.avatarChoiceHint: Choose system avatar or upload your own (choose one)
upload.talkingModelFixed: Digital human video is generated through the LivePortrait cloud API only
upload.voiceApiOnly: Speech uses the Aliyun CosyVoice API only. Local TTS options are no longer shown.
upload.voiceChoiceHint: Use system voice or upload your own (choose one)

config.title: Configuration
config.ttsVoicePresetHint: Select a preset to preview, or enter a custom voice parameter below

script.title: Confirm voice script
script.desc: Check and edit the script for each page. Layout: all pages listed vertically.
script.costHint: Generating the final video will consume {{count}} points

errors.quotaUserInsufficient: You need at least {{count}} remaining points to generate a video

complete.title: Video ready
complete.usageRecordFailed: The video is ready, but deducting {{count}} points failed
complete.videoNotSupported: Your browser does not support the video tag.
